positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a whimsical cosmic scene. A friendly, pastel-colored nebula forms a cradle around a stylized crescent moon and a cluster of abstract planets. Incorporate simple, playful celestial elements like orbiting rings, small geometric stars, and gentle wisps of gas. The composition should be centered and symmetrical, designed for high visibility on apparel. The overall style is retro-vintage astronomical travel posters mixed with contemporary Scandinavian flat design. Use a limited color palette of muted lavender, sky blue, soft peach, and cream, maximizing strong contrast against a deep indigo background. The final image must feature clean, sharp vector lines and a graphic, silkscreen print aesthetic. Ideal for a central, scalable graphic print.
